steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery
Comparison Table added to the report document.

steps.expression: (() => { const dialog = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role="dialog"]')).find((node) => ((node.innerText || node.textContent || '').includes('Edit Table Block'))); if (!dialog) { throw new Error('Edit Table Block dialog not found.'); } const select = dialog.querySelector('select[aria-label="Visual for Channel"]'); if (!select) { throw new Error('Channel visual select not found.'); } select.value = 'tone'; select.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); })()
(() => { const text = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Channel tone'); })()

steps.text: Saved exploration artifact: Report Builder Demo
Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Prepare get response')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Prepare get response button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: Get ReportDocument response: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Reopen in builder')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Reopen in builder button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: Reopened ReportDocument Report Builder Demo for editing.

steps.expression: (() => { const text = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Channel tone'); })()

(() => { const panels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-runtime-table-panel')); return panels.some((panel) => { const text = panel.innerText || panel.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Available Impressions') && text.includes('Display') && text.includes('CTV'); }); })()
